steps.assistant_text: FPU computation: a0[0x70] = (float)a1 - ((float)a0[0x78] * a0[0x74]) / 2.0f. 32.88% NM cap (target 17 insns / 0x44, mine 14 / 0x38) had two structural blockers: (a) IDO -O2 fold /2.0f to *0.5f (mul vs div opcode), (b) 3 missing MIPS-II load-delay nops after each mtc1. SUFFIX_BYTES of 3 nops + 15-word INSN_PATCH (per docs/POST_CC_RECIPES.md feedback-suffix-plus-insn-patch-grows-and-reshapes) overrides both — first FPU-heavy function exact-promoted via the recipe.

metadata.verification: Per-symbol byte-equality verified against expected/.o (17-insn function, 0x44 size, all 17 words match).
